S.FORM: I 2009 miheca'an, mo'tep a folad mapatireng to i Taypak ko taykako Yincominco. O pipasifana'an to sowal ato kimad kasafinacadan.
S.PHON: i **** miħəʦaʡan, mo~uʡtəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mapatirəŋ to~u i tajpak ko~u tajkako~u jinʦo~uminʦo~u. o~u pipasifanaʡan to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u kimaɬ~ɮ kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: I 2009 miheca'an, mo'tep a folad mapatireng to i Taypak ko taykako Yincominco. O pipasifana'an to sowal ato kimad kasafinacadan.
S.PHON: i **** miħəʦaʡan, mo~uʡtəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mapatirəŋ to~u i tajpak ko~u tajkako~u jinʦo~uminʦo~u. o~u pipasifanaʡan to~u so~uwaɾ ato~u kimaɬ~ɮ kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan.
